title: rhododendron × pruhonicianum
intro: Rhododendron × pruhonicianum, also known as Pujehui rhododendron or Pujehui azalea, is a hybrid plant species within the Rhododendron genus, specifically created by crossing Rhododendron fortunei and Rhododendron dauricum. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Rhododendron × pruhonicianum include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help protect the body against infections and oxidative stress. Rhododendron × pruhonicianum is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although its use should be supervised by a healthcare professional due to the potential for interactions with other medications.
